tasks.subject: Task 1: Cache admission_rejected as never-cache
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 'admission_rejected' to DomainCache._NEVER_CACHE_METHODS so a saturation rejection never poisons the domain-keyed cache.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/domain_fr.py:46`
- Test: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_domain_cache_admission.py` (NEW)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 'admission_rejected' member of `DomainCache._NEVER_CACHE_METHODS`
- [ ] `DomainCache.set(...)` is a no-op when `result['method'] == 'admission_rejected'`
- [ ] Existing `_NEVER_CACHE_METHODS` members (`'error'`, `'fetch_failed'`) unchanged
- [ ] New test passes; existing `test_domain_fr.py` cache tests still pass

**Verify:** `pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_domain_cache_admission.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/domain_fr.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_domain_cache_admission.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_domain_cache_admission.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["admission_rejected in _NEVER_CACHE_METHODS", "DomainCache.set is no-op for admission_rejected", "existing entries unchanged", "new + existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Route-level admission helper + wire-up + endpoint translation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `_AdmissionRejected` exception + `_fetch_with_admission()` helper. Wire into `_detect_single_url` initial fetch + homepage fallback via `_inflight_dedup.coalesce`. Translate exception → HTTP 503 in single `/detect`, → inline `DetectionResponse(method='admission_rejected')` in batch.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/main.py` (re-export `_prod_admission`)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py`
- Test: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py` (NEW — scenarios 1-4)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_AdmissionRejected` exception at module scope in routes.py
- [ ] `_fetch_with_admission(url, proxy_url, endpoint_label)` helper acquires `_prod_admission`, raises on saturation, increments counter, releases in finally
- [ ] `_detect_single_url` initial fetch goes through `_inflight_dedup.coalesce(key, lambda: _fetch_with_admission(...))`
- [ ] Homepage fallback fetch also wrapped (separate dedup key)
- [ ] Single `/detect` catches `_AdmissionRejected` → `HTTPException(status_code=503, headers={'Retry-After': ...})`
- [ ] Batch `_process_item_core` catches → `DetectionResponse(ok=False, method='admission_rejected', error='Service temporarily saturated')`
- [ ] `_prod_admission` exported from main.py, imported in routes.py
- [ ] Items with `html_content` provided never enter `_fetch_with_admission`

**Verify:** `pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py -v` → scenarios 1-4 pass (some may need Task 3 to fully pass)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/main.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exception + helper defined", "initial fetch wrapped via coalesce", "homepage fallback wrapped via coalesce", "single /detect translates to 503 + Retry-After", "batch translates to inline admission_rejected", "html_content path bypasses helper"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Shrink AdmissionMiddleware to /detect-debug only
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove `_PROD_PATHS` and `prod_controller` constructor parameter from `AdmissionMiddleware`. After this task, `/detect`, `/detect-batch`, `/check-url` are gated only at the route level (or not at all). `/detect-debug` keeps its debug-pool gate.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/middleware/admission.py`
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/main.py` (call site)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission.py` (if exists — remove prod-path expectations)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_PROD_PATHS` constant removed
- [ ] `AdmissionMiddleware.__init__` no longer accepts `prod_controller`
- [ ] Middleware only gates `_DEBUG_PATH`
- [ ] `app/main.py` no longer passes `prod_controller=_prod_admission`
- [ ] `_prod_admission` still at module scope in main.py (consumed by routes.py)
- [ ] `INFLIGHT_REQUESTS` gauge increment removed from middleware
- [ ] All Task 2 carve-out tests now pass
- [ ] `/detect-debug` admission test still passes

**Verify:** `pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/middleware/admission.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/main.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_PROD_PATHS removed", "prod_controller param removed", "main.py call site updated", "/detect-debug still gated", "all carve-out tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Extend batch Pass 2 retry-set for admission_rejected
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 'admission_rejected' to both the standard `/detect-batch` Pass 2 retry filter and the `first_match` per-group retry filter. Saturation is transient — a slot may free between Pass 1 and Pass 2.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py` (4 filter sites)
- Test: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py` (extend)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Standard Pass 2 retries items with method in `('fetch_failed', 'challenge_page', 'admission_rejected')` (`failed_indices` filter + inner-loop method check)
- [ ] `first_match` `process_group` failed-list captures items with the same extended set
- [ ] `first_match` Pass 2 stop condition uses extended set
- [ ] New test `test_batch_pass2_retries_admission_rejected` passes (flaky_acquire fixture: first refuse, then succeed)

**Verify:** `pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py::test_batch_pass2_retries_admission_rejected -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py::test_batch_pass2_retries_admission_rejected -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["standard Pass 2 filter extended", "first_match group filter extended", "first_match Pass 2 stop condition extended", "new test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Integration test suite (remaining scenarios)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cover remaining spec §9 scenarios: `/check-url` bypass, dedup follower no-acquire, dedup leader rejection propagation, `admission_rejected` not cached, homepage fallback admission surfaces admission_rejected (no downgrade), `/detect-debug` isolation, kill switch contract.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py` (append)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `test_check_url_bypasses_admission` passes
- [ ] `test_dedup_follower_no_admission_acquire` passes (acquire count == 1 for 5 concurrent identical URLs)
- [ ] `test_dedup_follower_propagates_rejection` passes (all callers see 503)
- [ ] `test_admission_rejected_never_cached` passes (cache.set never called with admission_rejected)
- [ ] `test_homepage_fallback_admission` passes (homepage fetch rejection surfaces 503, not soft_404)
- [ ] `test_debug_pool_isolated` passes
- [ ] `test_admission_disabled_kill_switch` documents the contract (assertion or comment)
- [ ] Full file `test_admission_carveout.py` green

**Verify:** `pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/check-url bypass", "dedup follower no acquire", "dedup propagation", "admission_rejected not cached", "homepage fallback admission surfaces correctly", "debug pool isolated", "kill switch documented"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Update CLAUDE.md (§ Concurrency & Admission Control)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite § Concurrency & Admission Control to describe route-level gating, document the `INFLIGHT_REQUESTS` semantic shift, add `admission_rejected` method to the reference table, document `/check-url` bypass and Pass 2 retry-set extension.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md` (lines 78–100)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] § Concurrency & Admission Control rewritten with 4-layer model (route-level prod gate, debug middleware, dedup, browser semaphore)
- [ ] `INFLIGHT_REQUESTS` semantic shift documented with date 2026-05-17
- [ ] `admission_rejected` method documented (surfaced only in /detect-batch, single endpoint → 503)
- [ ] `/check-url` bypass documented
- [ ] Pass 2 retry-set extension documented
- [ ] Cross-reference to spec `2026-05-17-detection-langue-fr-crawler-admission-carveout-design.md`

**Verify:** `grep -nE "admission_rejected|route-level|2026-05-17" apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -nE \"admission_rejected|route-level|2026-05-17\" apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["§ Concurrency rewritten with 4-layer model", "INFLIGHT_REQUESTS semantic shift documented", "admission_rejected method documented", "/check-url bypass documented", "spec cross-reference present"]}
```
